items.title: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
items.titleZh: 询问 HN：为 AI 生成的文章添加标记
items.summary:
Should HN add the ability to flag articles as AI-generated? This doesn't have to act as a regular flag, i.e., it won't de-rank the article; it could just show up as an indicator, allowing others (like myself) who don't like reading AI-generated text, to skip it. Open questions: 1. Why is the regular voting system not enough? 2. Should HN change in response to the gen AI era? It has been successful not changing fundamentals.

 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48886741

 Points: 47

 # Comments: 18
items.summaryZh:
HN 是否应该添加将文章标记为 AI 生成的功能？这不必充当常规标志，即，它不会降低文章的排名；它可以只是显示为一个指示器，让不喜欢阅读人工智能生成文本的其他人（比如我自己）跳过它。开放性问题： 1. 为什么常规投票制度不够？ 2. HN是否应该改变以应对新一代人工智能时代？它在不改变基本面的情况下取得了成功。

 评论网址：https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48886741

 积分：47

items.author: therepanic

items.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt; OpenCode sends 7k
items.titleZh: Claude Code 在阅读提示之前发送了 33k 令牌； OpenCode 发送 7k
items.summary:
This started based off of a hunch. We usually use OpenCode, but were 'forced' to use Claude Code for a while due to issues with Meridian. In that time, we saw the usage meter rise much, much more quickly than when using OpenCode. This was the initial anecdotal evidence, but we undertook this small study to collect empirical data: We added logging between the agentic coding tool (Claude Code and OpenCode) and Anthropic's endpoint, and captured all requests (and the returned usage blocks). With one caveat (toward the end of the post) we found unambiguously that Claude Code was far more inefficient in terms of its cache strategy and its harness token usage than OpenCode.

 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48883275

 Points: 469

 # Comments: 263
items.summaryZh:
这源于一种预感。我们通常使用 OpenCode，但由于 Meridian 的问题而“被迫”使用 Claude Code 一段时间。当时，我们看到使用量的增长速度比使用 OpenCode 时快得多。这是最初的轶事证据，但我们进行了这项小型研究来收集经验数据：我们在代理编码工具（Claude Code 和 OpenCode）和 Anthropic 的端点之间添加了日志记录，并捕获了所有请求（以及返回的使用块）。需要注意的是（在文章末尾），我们明确发现 Claude Code 在缓存策略和工具令牌使用方面比 OpenCode 低效得多。

 评论网址：https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48883275

 积分：469

 # 评论：263
